name: adult multipack wet dog food with chicken, turkey & beef
description: hill's science plan adult dog food loaf variety pack contains a feast of 3 flavours, composed of 12 loaf cans: 6 with chicken, 3 with beef & 3 with turkey. it is a complete pet food for adult dogs 1–6 years old. precisely balanced to deliver the appropriate amount of energy to support ideal body weight. easy to digest with high-quality protein and vitamin e & fatty acids precisely balanced to deliver the appropriate amount of energy to maintain ideal body weight
